meta.title: Filling the gap between hns and adhE in Escherichia coli K12

abstractHtml: As a consequence of the absence of a general coordination process in the sequencing of the Escherichia coli K12 genome, to completely sequence the genome in a reasonable time it is important to fill in gaps between known regions. We report the sequence of the hns-adh region, at 27 min on the genome.
